caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a plain dark background, appearing as a speaker. She wears a light green, embroidered tunic with a dark necklace and a small lapel microphone clipped to her neckline. In the first frame, she looks forward with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, she begins to speak, with her mouth opening and closing slightly to articulate words. Her head tilts and shifts marginally between frames, maintaining her gaze toward the camera. A small logo featuring a stylized circular symbol and the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left and center-bottom areas of the frames. The lighting is consistent across the scene, focusing on the subject while the background remains a dark, featureless void.
